title: Surf Nights | Night surfing in Playa Hermosa
desc: Professional-grade lighting in Playa Hermosa for night surfing. A unique experience for pro and amateur surfers.

UNIQUE EXPERIENCE IN CENTRAL AMERICA
The Illuminated Ocean

Surf Nights: The first live televised night surfing event in Central America

The Temple of Surf

Hotel Terraza del Pacífico is one of only 4 places in the world with professional infrastructure to illuminate the open ocean and allow night surfing competitions with safety and competitive visibility.

Professional Infrastructure

Our professional lighting system transforms Playa Hermosa beach into a world-class stage. With professional-grade lighting equipment strategically positioned, we create an experience that combines adrenaline, safety, and unprecedented spectacle.

This exclusive capability makes Terraza del Pacífico an essential destination for professional and amateur surfers looking to live a truly unique experience: competing under the stars with professional visibility.

Competition-grade professional lighting
Safe environment in open sea
World-class experience

"Surf Nights is not just a competition. It's a testament to what's possible when passion for surfing meets technological innovation. Here, in Playa Hermosa, we've created something the whole world watches."

Making History

The last edition of Surf Nights marked a before and after in the region

First Live Television Broadcast

For the first time in Central American history, a night surfing event was broadcast live nationwide. The coverage by Canal 33 / Trivisión brought the Surf Nights experience to thousands of homes, elevating the event from a local competition to a professional media phenomenon.

With professional narration by Freddy "Salsiboy" Camacho and certified judges, Surf Nights set new standards for surfing competitions in the region.

National television coverage
Live professional narration
International certified judges
For Competitors

Complete information about registration, prizes, and what you need to know to participate

100% Free Registration

There is no registration fee. You only need your passion for surfing and your board.
